organizations.name: Animo Solutions
organizations.description: Development and consultancy on verifiable credentials, with an expertise in open source. Creators of the Paradym platform. Here to build. Animo is making it easy to build self-sovereign identity solutions. Whether it is through our SSI demo, development tools like Siera CLI & Siera Desktop, or our open-source development work. Animo is the maintainer of Aries Framework Javascript and contributor to ACA-Py, AATH, Anoncreds, Askar, vdr and the Aries RFC'S. Animo is an industry leader in open-source self-sovereign identity development and available for dev services and consultancy.

Its approach emphasizes privacy, security, and seamless user experience, contributing to the global landscape of digital identity and verifiable data.

organizations.name: Oumou Group

The organization supports governments, institutions, and private sector actors in building solutions tailored to African and international contexts. Within the digital domain, Oumou Group is actively contributing to the development of sovereign digital identity ecosystems. Through initiatives such as the Uwangu wallet, the group explores the use of verifiable credentials and wallet-based architectures aligned with open frameworks such as GovStack, aiming to enable secure, interoperable, and inclusive digital services. Operating from Senegal with a growing presence across multiple African countries, Oumou Group combines technological innovation with a strong commitment to social impact, contributing to sustainable development in areas such as education, public services, and economic resilience.
